name: Binah Capital Group, Inc.
summary: Binah Capital Group, Inc. (BCG) is a financial services holding company. Based on the filing, the company operates in investment advisory and wealth management services, supporting financial advisors and their clients with investment products and services. The company faces regulatory oversight and compliance obligations typical of financial services firms, and its business involves managing customer assets and expanding its advisor and customer base.
